titleStmt.title: SII 30.12: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 12. (A.R. No. 90 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple-on the south wall of the central shrine Vīkrama-Chōḻa: year 3+1: 1277 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete and damaged. It records the gift of eight paḻañjalāgai-achchu by a mendicant of this temple called Piḷḷaiyār Piṟavāneṟikāṭṭiṉāṟ for providing food offerings and conducting worship to the god on the occasion of the festival of vasantham, in the month of Vaikāsi etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vikkiramacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 vatukku Etirāvatu Āvaṇi mātam mutal Āḷuṭaiyār tirumuru
tapaciyaril piḷḷaiyār piṟavāneṟikāṭṭināneṉ yinṉāyinār vaikāci vacantattukku pūcaikkum nāyakar tiruvitiyile yiraṇṭu
ṉ paḻañcalākai Accu Eṭṭum yitin Upaiyaṅ koṇṭu Aṟṟai Aḻivu Amutupaṭi Arici kalane patakkum kaṟiyamutu neyamu
tirumeṟpūccum tiruviḷakkukkum Eṇṇai kāṇattāl AintāḻayumRead- ainnāḻiyum yiḷanir 9- tum caivācāriya dakṣaṇaiyum tirumañcaṇamum pañ
Digital edition of SII 30.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
